skills.name: clone-website
skills.description: Reverse-engineer and clone one or more websites into a Next.js/App Router frontend by extracting screenshots, assets, computed CSS, content, interactions, responsive behavior, and component specs before building.

skills.name: risk-oriented-code-review
skills.description: Second-layer code review focused on hidden side effects, compatibility breaks, boundary cases, performance, security, tests, and maintenance risk.

skills.name: debugging-webpage-anomalies
skills.description: Diagnose browser tabs and web apps with OOM, high CPU, long tasks, excessive GC, React render/update loops, JS heap growth, DOM growth, detached DOM, huge strings, ArrayBuffer memory, layout stalls, paint stalls, or worker spikes.

skills.name: skill-recommender
skills.description: Recommend the best-matching Skill from this repository's first-party Skills and recorded third-party Skills based on the user's current scenario. Designed for use with /recommend.
